query:
SELECT l.macro_id AS "macro_id!"
        FROM email_threads et
        JOIN email_links l ON et.link_id = l.id
        WHERE et.id = $1
        UNION
        SELECT mul.primary_macro_id
        FROM email_threads et
        JOIN email_links l ON et.link_id = l.id
        JOIN macro_user_links mul ON mul.child_macro_id = l.macro_id
        WHERE et.id = $1
